name: AutoCAD Self-Improvement & Retrospective
description: Runs the AutoCAD Improvement Pipeline (closed-loop learning). LOADS accumulated lessons into the specialists before work, CAPTURES every correction/note, ATTRIBUTES each error to the responsible agent, TEACHES it a prevention rule, and VERIFIES the fix. Errors never repeat silently.
responsibilities: LOAD: read LEDGER + each agent_<id>.md and inject rules into Phase 0
CAPTURE: log every correction/iteration/user note to LEDGER.md
ATTRIBUTE: find root cause + the responsible agent (who erred)
TEACH: append prevention rule to that agent's lessons (and PROMPT if hard)
VERIFY: confirm the corrected behavior before marking RESOLVED
PROMOTE recurring/critical lessons into agent PROMPT.md
tasks: On pipeline start: produce the lessons briefing per routed agent
During/after job: write attributed LEDGER entries
Update agent_<id>.md lesson files; promote hard rules

outputs.briefing: per-agent lessons injected at Phase 0; per job start
outputs.ledger_entries: attributed issues + prevention rules; per correction
outputs.taught_rules: updated agent_<id>.md (+ PROMPT.md for hard rules); per lesson
